stories.title: Kane leads England to statement win over Croatia
stories.summary: England coach Thomas Tuchel said his players overcame their nerves and the psychological fear of losing a lead to power past Croatia at Dallas Stadium (AT&T Stadium) on Wednesday.

stories.title: Portugal boss defends loyalty to misfiring Ronaldo...
stories.summary: Congo DR produced another stunning result at the 2026 World Cup, as the African side held one of the pre-tournament favorites, Portugal, to a 1-1 draw in Houston on Wednesday.

stories.title: NYPD to deploy 10K officers for Knicks title parad...
stories.summary: The victory parade for the NBA champion New York Knicks will be safeguarded by 10,000 members of the NYPD, the largest number of police officers ever assigned to a planned event, the department said Wednesday.

stories.title: Cincinnati denies claim it knew of Sorsby's bettin...
stories.summary: Cincinnati on Wednesday, responding to Brendan Sorsby's agent publicly questioning the school's handling of the quarterback's gambling in 2024, said it would never knowingly play an athlete who violated NCAA gambling rules.

stories.title: 'Debut album': Clark unveils signature Nike shoe
stories.summary: Caitlin Clark announced her first signature shoe -- the Caitlin 1 -- on Wednesday afternoon.
